why: Protocol 775 Handshaking serverbound minecraft:intention must dispatch through Stevenarella packet_by_id using the official framed packet id and body bytes generated by the oracle answer. This is packet framing/dispatch/decode evidence only, not Login authentication, Configuration entry, or client-load completion.
what: The exact Rust oracle test aborts while exercising packet::packet_by_id(775, State::Handshaking, Direction::Serverbound, packet id 0, official intention body bytes) because the current Protocol 775 version table has no Handshaking serverbound mapping.
stop_condition: The exact Rust oracle test passes, then the jar-backed oracle runner passes for this case and the full oracle_contracts Rust test surface passes without editing oracle expected-answer artifacts.
